3214130.name: DEAD RISING Deluxe Remaster - Ambient & Horror (Sound Track)
3214130.description:
DEAD RISING Deluxe Remaster Original Soundtrack

Experience the haunting and atmospheric sounds of DEAD RISING like never before. This deluxe remaster includes fan-favorite tracks previously available only on physical CD, now released digitally for the first time. Additionally, enjoy brand-new compositions crafted exclusively for this collection. Immerse yourself in a blend of ambient and horror themes that perfectly capture the essence of the game.
